description: CompositionMaroon and navy blue jacket made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has a hood with drawstrings and sleeves in white, adidas patented 3-Stripes from the shoulders to the cuffs, ribbed cuffs and hem, twill detailing on the bust area and pockets on the front waistFittingComfortWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decoartionsPerfect for your sporting needs, this jacket from adidas is designed to keep you warm and comfortable during your training sessions in the winter chill. Team it with adidas track pants and sports shoes for a sporty look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in jacketsHeight: 6'1', Shoulders: 18.5"
